# Biomarker catalog

**Auto-generated by** `scripts/audit_biomarkers.py`. Re-run after any change under `knowledge_base/hosted/content/{biomarkers,indications,algorithms,redflags}/`. Do not hand-edit.

Purpose: single source of truth for which biomarkers OpenOnco's engine actually consumes. Drives the PDF-extraction pattern library (`docs/plans/biopsy_pdf_extraction_2026-04-26.md`) — only catalog-listed biomarkers get regex patterns.

## Summary

- **Defined entities:** 181
- **Referenced by rules:** 120 unique IDs, 550 total citations
- **Defined + used (✓):** 110
- **Defined + unused (⚠):** 71
- **Referenced + missing (❌):** 10

## Distribution by measurement method

Method category drives PDF-extraction pattern complexity. IHC + serum + MSI markers report as a single value (easy regex). FISH/NGS results carry positional + breakpoint metadata (medium). Composite scores (IPI, MIPI, FLIPI) need multi-component arithmetic.

| Method group | Count |
|---|---|
| NGS | 85 |
| IHC | 35 |
| FISH | 32 |
| composite | 8 |
| viral | 7 |
| methylation | 3 |
| serum | 3 |
| histology | 2 |
| FISH/NGS | 1 |
| gene expression | 1 |
| MSI/MMR | 1 |
| imaging | 1 |
| cell count | 1 |
| NGS-TMB | 1 |
